    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="es">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Manuscrito.js - Texto, LaTeX y Markdown a Manuscrito (Pro)</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
    href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Caveat:wght@400..700&family=Gloria+Hallelujah&family=Shadows+Into+Light&family=Kalam:wght@400;700&family=Inter:wght@400;600;700&display=swap"
    rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    body {
    background-color: #f1f5f9;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: #f1f1f1;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: #c1c1c1;
    border-radius: 4px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: #a8a8a8;
    }
    .page-container {
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    background: white;
    cursor: crosshair;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
    }
    .page-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.005);
    }
    .toolbar-btn {
    padding: 4px 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #4f46e5;
    background: #e0e7ff;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    .toolbar-btn:hover {
    background: #c7d2fe;
    border-color: #a5b4fc;
    }
    /* Editor flotante para edición WYSIWYG */
    #edit-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    display: none;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
    border: 2px solid #6366f1;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.25), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    min-width: 240px;
    max-width: 420px;
    }
    #edit-overlay label {
    display: block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #6366f1;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    #edit-input {
    width: 100%;
    font-family: monospace;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #1e293b;
    background: #f8fafc;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 6px 8px;
    outline: none;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    #edit-input:focus {
    border-color: #6366f1;
    }
    #edit-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 8px;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .edit-btn {
    padding: 4px 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .edit-btn-confirm {
    background: #6366f1;
    color: white;
    }
    .edit-btn-confirm:hover {
    background: #4f46e5;
    }
    .edit-btn-cancel {
    background: #f1f5f9;
    color: #64748b;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    }
    .edit-btn-cancel:hover {
    background: #e2e8f0;
    }
    /* Selector de modo */
    .mode-btn {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 5px 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    border: 1.5px solid transparent;
    text-align: center;
    }
    .mode-btn.active {
    background: #6366f1;
    color: white;
    border-color: #4f46e5;
    }
    .mode-btn:not(.active) {
    background: #f1f5f9;
    color: #64748b;
    border-color: #e2e8f0;
    }
    .mode-btn:not(.active):hover {
    background: #e0e7ff;
    color: #4f46e5;
    }
    /* Hint del canvas */
    #canvas-hint {
    position: fixed;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 50;
    background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.9);
    color: white;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    display: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    transform: translate(-50%, -130%);
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body class="flex h-screen overflow-hidden antialiased text-slate-800 relative">
    <!-- Overlay de Edición WYSIWYG mejorado -->
    <div id="edit-overlay">
    <label>✏️ Editar texto</label>
    <input type="text" id="edit-input" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false">
    <div id="edit-actions">
    <button class="edit-btn edit-btn-cancel" id="edit-cancel">✕ Cancelar</button>
    <button class="edit-btn edit-btn-confirm" id="edit-confirm">✓ Guardar</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Tooltip de hover sobre canvas -->
    <div id="canvas-hint">✏️ Clic para editar</div>
    <!-- ===================== PANEL IZQUIERDO ===================== -->
    <aside class="w-full md:w-[450px] bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col shadow-xl z-10 flex-shrink-0">
    <div class="p-4 border-b border-slate-100 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50">
    <h1 class="text-xl font-extrabold text-indigo-800 tracking-tight flex items-center gap-2">
    <svg class="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"
    d="M15.232 5.232l3.536 3.536m-2.036-5.036a2.5 2.5 0 113.536 3.536L6.5 21.036H3v-3.572L16.732 3.732z" />
    </svg>
    Manuscrito.js <span
    class="text-xs font-semibold bg-indigo-600 text-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ml-auto">PRO</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 mt-1">Soporte LaTeX, Markdown y edición directa en el papel.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="p-4 flex-1 overflow-y-auto space-y-4">
    <!-- ── MODO DE INTERPRETACIÓN ── -->
    <div class="space-y-1.5">
    <label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide">Modo de
    interpretación</label>
    <div class="flex gap-1.5">
    <button class="mode-btn active" id="mode-latex" onclick="setMode('latex')">LaTeX</button>
    <button class="mode-btn" id="mode-markdown" onclick="setMode('markdown')">Markdown</button>
    <button class="mode-btn" id="mode-mixed" onclick="setMode('mixed')">Mixto</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── EDITOR ── -->
    <div class="space-y-1">
    <div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-1">
    <label class="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-700">Editor Principal</label>
    <span class="text-indigo-500 font-normal text-[10px]">Selecciona texto y usa los botones</span>
    </div>
    <!-- Barra de herramientas dinámica -->
    <div id="toolbar-latex"
    class="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-2 bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\textbf{', '}')" title="Negrita"><b>B</b></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\textit{', '}')" title="Cursiva"><i>I</i></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\underline{', '}')"
    title="Subrayado"><u>U</u></button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\section{', '}')">Sección</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\subsection{', '}')">Sub</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn"
    onclick="wrapText('\\begin{center}\n', '\n\\end{center}')">Centrar</button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\fbox{', '}')">Caja</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn"
    onclick="wrapText('\\begin{equation*}\n', '\n\\end{equation*}')">Fórmula</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\frac{', '}{denominador}')">Fracción</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\sqrt{', '}')">√</button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="stripBoldToText()"
    title="Convierte \textbf{...} en \text{...} en todo el editor"
    style="background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;border-color:#fcd34d">B→txt</button>
    </div>
    <div id="toolbar-markdown"
    class="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-2 bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200"
    style="display:none!important">
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('**', '**')" title="Negrita"><b>B</b></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('*', '*')" title="Cursiva"><i>I</i></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('__', '__')" title="Subrayado"><u>U</u></button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('# ')">H1</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('## ')">H2</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('### ')">H3</button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('---')">──</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('`', '`')">código</button>
    </div>
    <div id="toolbar-mixed"
    class="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-2 bg-slate-50 p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200"
    style="display:none!important">
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\textbf{', '}')"
    title="Negrita LaTeX"><b>B</b></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('**', '**')" title="Negrita MD"><b>B*</b></button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\textit{', '}')" title="Cursiva"><i>I</i></button>
    <div class="w-px h-5 bg-slate-300 mx-0.5 self-center"></div>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\section{', '}')">§</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('# ')">H1</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\frac{', '}{den}')">Frac</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="wrapText('\\sqrt{', '}')">√</button>
    <button class="toolbar-btn" onclick="insertLine('---')">──</button>
    </div>
    <textarea id="text-input"
    class="w-full h-40 p-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 focus:border-indigo-500 transition shadow-sm resize-none text-xs font-mono leading-relaxed"
    placeholder="Escribe o pega tu texto aquí..."></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 border-t border-slate-100 pt-3">
    <!-- Encabezado y numeración -->
    <div class="space-y-1 col-span-2 flex gap-3">
    <div class="flex-1">
    <label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Encabezado de página</label>
    <textarea id="header-text" rows="2"
    class="w-full p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-xs outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 resize-none"
    placeholder="Ej. Trabajo de Física"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-end mb-1.5">
    <label class="flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer text-xs font-bold text-slate-700">
    <input type="checkbox" id="page-numbers" checked class="w-3.5 h-3.5 accent-indigo-600">
    Numerar
    </label>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Font -->
    <div class="space-y-1">
    <label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide">Fuente</label>
    <select id="font-select"
    class="w-full p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition cursor-pointer text-xs">
    <option value="Caveat">Caveat</option>
    <option value="Gloria Hallelujah">Gloria Hallelujah</option>
    <option value="Shadows Into Light">Shadows Into Light</option>
    <option value="Kalam">Kalam</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <!-- Tinta y Papel -->
    <div class="space-y-1">
    <label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide">Tinta y
    Papel</label>
    <div class="flex gap-1">
    <select id="color-select"
    class="w-1/2 p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-xs outline-none">
    <option value="#0f172a">Negro</option>
    <option value="#1e3a8a" selected>Azul</option>
    <option value="#7f1d1d">Rojo</option>
    </select>
    <select id="paper-select"
    class="w-1/2 p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-xs outline-none">
    <option value="lined">Rayas</option>
    <option value="blank">Blanco</option>
    <option value="grid">Cuadros</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Sliders -->
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Tamaño:
    <span id="size-val" class="text-indigo-600">30</span>px</label><input type="range"
    id="size-range" min="18" max="60" value="30"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label
    class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Inclinación: <span id="tilt-val"
    class="text-indigo-600">40</span>%</label><input type="range" id="tilt-range" min="0"
    max="100" value="40"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label
    class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Imperfección: <span id="jitter-val"
    class="text-indigo-600">50</span>%</label><input type="range" id="jitter-range" min="0"
    max="100" value="50"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Ondulación:
    <span id="wobble-val" class="text-indigo-600">30</span>%</label><input type="range"
    id="wobble-range" min="0" max="100" value="30"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Ancho
    letra: <span id="width-val" class="text-indigo-600">100</span>%</label><input type="range"
    id="width-range" min="50" max="150" value="100"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Sangría
    Math: <span id="indent-val" class="text-indigo-600">40</span>px</label><input type="range"
    id="indent-range" min="0" max="120" value="40"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Peso
    Símbolos: <span id="fallback-weight-val" class="text-indigo-600">400</span></label><input
    type="range" id="fallback-weight-range" min="100" max="900" step="100" value="400"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-0.5"><label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase">Grosor
    Lápiz: <span id="main-weight-val" class="text-indigo-600">0</span></label><input type="range"
    id="main-weight-range" min="0" max="20" value="0"
    class="w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigo-600 mt-1">
    </div>
    <!-- Opciones extra -->
    <div class="col-span-2 flex flex-wrap gap-3 pt-1">
    <label class="flex items-center gap-1.5 cursor-pointer text-xs text-slate-700 font-semibold">
    <input type="checkbox" id="strip-accents" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 accent-indigo-600">
    Eliminar acentos
    </label>
    <label class="flex items-center gap-1.5 cursor-pointer text-xs text-slate-700 font-semibold"
    title="Aplica textura granulada simulando lápiz">
    <input type="checkbox" id="pencil-effect" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 accent-indigo-600" checked>
    Textura Lápiz
    </label>
    </div>
    <!-- Fuentes personalizadas -->
    <div class="space-y-2 border-t border-slate-200 pt-3 col-span-2">
    <label class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide">Añadir Fuente
    Personalizada</label>
    <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
    <label
    class="flex-1 flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg p-2 hover:bg-amber-100 transition text-xs text-amber-800 font-medium">
    <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"
    d="M4 16v1a3 3 0 003 3h10a3 3 0 003-3v-1m-4-8l-4-4m0 0L8 8m4-4v12" />
    </svg>
    Subir archivo .ttf / .otf
    <input type="file" id="font-upload" accept=".ttf,.otf,.woff,.woff2" class="hidden">
    </label>
    </div>
    <div class="flex gap-1.5">
    <select id="font-source"
    class="p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-[10px] outline-none cursor-pointer">
    <option value="google">Google</option>
    <option value="local">Local/PC</option>
    </select>
    <input type="text" id="custom-font-input"
    class="flex-1 p-1.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none text-xs"
    placeholder="Nombre de fuente">
    <button id="add-font-btn"
    class="bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 px-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-200 font-bold text-xs transition flex-shrink-0">+</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Export -->
    <div class="p-4 border-t border-slate-100 bg-white">
    <button id="export-btn"
    class="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-indigo-600/30 transition transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 text-sm">
    <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"
    d="M4 16v1a3 3 0 003 3h10a3 3 0 003-3v-1m-4-4l-4 4m0 0l-4-4m4 4V4" />
    </svg>
    Exportar a PDF
    </button>
    </div>
    </aside>
    <!-- ===================== PANEL DERECHO ===================== -->
    <main class="flex-1 bg-slate-200/50 overflow-y-auto p-4 md:p-6 relative" id="main-scroll">
    <div
    class="max-w-[800px] mx-auto text-center mb-4 text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold bg-white/50 py-1.5 rounded-full shadow-sm">
    💡 Pasa el cursor sobre el texto y haz clic para editarlo directamente en el papel.
    </div>
    <div id="pages-wrapper" class="flex flex-col items-center gap-8 pb-12"></div>
    </main>
    <!-- ===================== JAVASCRIPT ===================== -->
    <script>
    // =========================================================
    // MODO GLOBAL
    // =========================================================
    let currentMode = 'latex'; // 'latex' | 'markdown' | 'mixed'
    function setMode(mode) {
    currentMode = mode;
    ['latex', 'markdown', 'mixed'].forEach(m => {
    document.getElementById('mode-' + m).classList.toggle('active', m === mode);
    const tb = document.getElementById('toolbar-' + m);
    if (tb) tb.style.setProperty('display', m === mode ? 'flex' : 'none', 'important');
    });
    triggerRender();
    }
    // =========================================================
    // UTILIDADES DE BARRA DE HERRAMIENTAS
    // =========================================================
    function wrapText(pre, post) {
    const input = document.getElementById('text-input');
    const start = input.selectionStart, end = input.selectionEnd;
    const text = input.value, selected = text.substring(start, end);
    input.value = text.substring(0, start) + pre + selected + post + text.substring(end);
    input.focus();
    input.setSelectionRange(start + pre.length, start + pre.length + selected.length);
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
    }
    function insertLine(prefix) {
    const input = document.getElementById('text-input');
    const start = input.selectionStart;
    const text = input.value;
    // Ir al inicio de la línea actual
    let lineStart = text.lastIndexOf('\n', start - 1) + 1;
    input.value = text.substring(0, lineStart) + prefix + text.substring(lineStart);
    input.focus();
    input.setSelectionRange(lineStart + prefix.length, lineStart + prefix.length);
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
    }
    // Reemplaza todos los \textbf{contenido} por \text{contenido} en el editor
    function stripBoldToText() {
    const input = document.getElementById('text-input');
    const before = input.value;
    // Reemplaza \textbf{...} → \text{...} (respeta llaves anidadas con un loop)
    let after = before.replace(/\\textbf\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\\text{$1}');
    if (after === before) {
    // Nada que reemplazar
    input.focus();
    return;
    }
    const cursor = input.selectionStart;
    input.value = after;
    // Mantener cursor en posición aproximada
    input.setSelectionRange(Math.min(cursor, after.length), Math.min(cursor, after.length));
    input.focus();
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
    }
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // ===== DOM =====
    const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
    const textInput = $('text-input'), fontSelect = $('font-select');
    const paperSelect = $('paper-select'), colorSelect = $('color-select');
    const headerText = $('header-text'), pageNumbers = $('page-numbers');
    const sizeRange = $('size-range'), sizeVal = $('size-val');
    const widthRange = $('width-range'), widthVal = $('width-val');
    const tiltRange = $('tilt-range'), tiltVal = $('tilt-val');
    const jitterRange = $('jitter-range'), jitterVal = $('jitter-val');
    const wobbleRange = $('wobble-range'), wobbleVal = $('wobble-val');
    const indentRange = $('indent-range'), indentVal = $('indent-val');
    const fallbackWeightRange = $('fallback-weight-range'), fallbackWeightVal = $('fallback-weight-val');
    const mainWeightRange = $('main-weight-range'), mainWeightVal = $('main-weight-val');
    const stripAccentsChk = $('strip-accents');
    const pencilEffectChk = $('pencil-effect');
    const fontSource = $('font-source'), customFontInput = $('custom-font-input');
    const addFontBtn = $('add-font-btn'), fontUpload = $('font-upload');
    const exportBtn = $('export-btn'), pagesWrapper = $('pages-wrapper');
    const editOverlay = $('edit-overlay');
    const editInput = $('edit-input');
    const editConfirm = $('edit-confirm');
    const editCancel = $('edit-cancel');
    const canvasHint = $('canvas-hint');
    const PW = 794, PH = 1123, ML = 100, MR = 60, MT = 120, MB = 100;
    // =========================================================
    // STRIP ACCENTS
    // =========================================================
    function stripAccents(str) {
    // Normaliza a NFD y elimina los diacríticos (caracteres combinatorios)
    return str.normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '');
    }
    function maybeStripAccents(str) {
    return stripAccentsChk.checked ? stripAccents(str) : str;
    }
    // =========================================================
    // EVENT LISTENERS
    // =========================================================
    const sliders = [[sizeRange, sizeVal], [widthRange, widthVal], [tiltRange, tiltVal], [jitterRange, jitterVal], [wobbleRange, wobbleVal], [indentRange, indentVal], [fallbackWeightRange, fallbackWeightVal], [mainWeightRange, mainWeightVal]];
    sliders.forEach(([r, l]) => r.addEventListener('input', () => { l.textContent = r.value; triggerRender(); }));
    [textInput, fontSelect, paperSelect, colorSelect, headerText, pageNumbers, stripAccentsChk, pencilEffectChk].forEach(el => el.addEventListener('input', triggerRender));
    // =========================================================
    // FONT UPLOAD
    // =========================================================
    fontUpload.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return;
    const name = file.name.replace(/\.(ttf|otf|woff2?)$/i, '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]/g, '');
    try {
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
    const ff = new FontFace(name, `url(${url})`);
    const loaded = await ff.load();
    document.fonts.add(loaded);
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = name; opt.textContent = name + ' (subida)';
    fontSelect.appendChild(opt); fontSelect.value = name;
    triggerRender();
    } catch (err) { alert('Error cargando fuente: ' + err.message); }
    });
    addFontBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const name = customFontInput.value.trim(); if (!name) return;
    if (fontSource.value === 'google') {
    const link = document.createElement('link');
    link.href = `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=${name.replace(/ /g, '+')}:wght@400;700&display=swap`;
    link.rel = 'stylesheet'; document.head.appendChild(link);
    link.onload = () => triggerRender();
    }
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = name; opt.textContent = name + (fontSource.value === 'local' ? ' (local)' : '');
    fontSelect.appendChild(opt); fontSelect.value = name;
    customFontInput.value = ''; triggerRender();
    });
    // =========================================================
    // DEBOUNCE
    // =========================================================
    let _rt; function triggerRender() { clearTimeout(_rt); _rt = setTimeout(executeRender, 130); }
    // =========================================================
    // LATEX SYMBOLS MAP
    // =========================================================
    const SYM = {
    '\\sigma': 'σ', '\\tau': 'τ', '\\varepsilon': 'ε', '\\epsilon': 'ε', '\\Delta': 'Δ', '\\delta': 'δ',
    '\\nu': 'ν', '\\alpha': 'α', '\\beta': 'β', '\\gamma': 'γ', '\\theta': 'θ', '\\Theta': 'Θ',
    '\\pi': 'π', '\\mu': 'μ', '\\rho': 'ρ', '\\omega': 'ω', '\\Omega': 'Ω', '\\lambda': 'λ', '\\Lambda': 'Λ',
    '\\phi': 'φ', '\\Phi': 'Φ', '\\psi': 'ψ', '\\Psi': 'Ψ', '\\chi': 'χ', '\\eta': 'η', '\\xi': 'ξ', '\\zeta': 'ζ',
    '\\kappa': 'κ', '\\iota': 'ι', '\\upsilon': 'υ',
    '\\infty': '∞', '\\sum': 'Σ', '\\int': '∫', '\\approx': '≈', '\\neq': '≠', '\\equiv': '≡',
    '\\leq': '≤', '\\geq': '≥', '\\times': '×', '\\cdot': '·', '\\pm': '±', '\\mp': '∓',
    '\\rightarrow': '→', '\\leftarrow': '←', '\\Rightarrow': '⇒', '\\Leftarrow': '⇐',
    '\\uparrow': '↑', '\\downarrow': '↓', '\\leftrightarrow': '↔',
    '\\partial': '∂', '\\nabla': '∇', '\\forall': '∀', '\\exists': '∃',
    '\\in': '∈', '\\notin': '∉', '\\subset': '⊂', '\\supset': '⊃', '\\cup': '∪', '\\cap': '∩', '\\emptyset': '∅',
    '\\max': 'max', '\\min': 'min', '\\log': 'log', '\\ln': 'ln', '\\sin': 'sin', '\\cos': 'cos',
    '\\tan': 'tan', '\\lim': 'lim', '\\exp': 'exp', '\\det': 'det',
    '\\circ': '∘', '\\bullet': '•', '\\star': '★', '\\ldots': '…', '\\cdots': '⋯',
    '\\hbar': 'ℏ', '\\Re': 'ℜ', '\\Im': 'ℑ',
    };
    const SYM_KEYS = Object.keys(SYM).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
    // =========================================================
    // MARKDOWN PREPROCESSOR
    // =========================================================
    function preprocessMarkdown(raw) {
    const blocks = [];
    // Dividir por líneas
    const lines = raw.split('\n');
    let i = 0;
    while (i < lines.length) {
    const line = lines[i];
    const trimmed = line.trim();
    if (!trimmed) { blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 8 }); i++; continue; }
    // Regla horizontal
    if (/^[-*_]{3,}$/.test(trimmed)) { blocks.push({ type: 'rule' }); i++; continue; }
    // Encabezados
    const h3 = trimmed.match(/^###\s+(.*)/);
    if (h3) { blocks.push({ type: 'text', content: parseMdInline(h3[1]), bold: true, scale: 1.1 }); i++; continue; }
    const h2 = trimmed.match(/^##\s+(.*)/);
    if (h2) { blocks.push({ type: 'text', content: parseMdInline(h2[1]), bold: true, scale: 1.2 }); i++; continue; }
    const h1 = trimmed.match(/^#\s+(.*)/);
    if (h1) { blocks.push({ type: 'text', content: parseMdInline(h1[1]), bold: true, scale: 1.4 }); i++; continue; }
    // <br> explícito → salto
    if (/^<br\s*\/?>$/i.test(trimmed)) { blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 20 }); i++; continue; }
    // Línea normal con posible <br> inline
    const parts = line.split(/<br\s*\/?>/i);
    for (let pi = 0; pi < parts.length; pi++) {
    const p = parts[pi].trim();
    if (p) parseMdLine(p, blocks);
    if (pi < parts.length - 1) blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 8 });
    }
    i++;
    }
    return blocks;
    }
    function parseMdLine(text, blocks) {
    // Detectar negrita, cursiva, subrayado en la línea
    // Los fragmentos inline se procesan como texto con estilos
    // Dividimos la línea respetando los marcadores **,*,__,_,`
    const segs = splitMdInline(text);
    if (segs.length === 0) return;
    // Agrupar en bloques inline
    for (const seg of segs) {
    if (seg.text && seg.text.trim()) {
    blocks.push({
    type: 'text',
    content: seg.text,
    bold: seg.bold || false,
    italic: seg.italic || false,
    underline: seg.underline || false,
    mono: seg.mono || false,
    inline: true
    });
    }
    }
    // Forzar nueva línea al final de la línea
    blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 0, newline: true });
    }
    function parseMdInline(text) {
    // Retorna solo texto plano (sin estilos) para títulos
    return text
    .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '$1')
    .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '$1')
    .replace(/__(.+?)__/g, '$1')
    .replace(/_(.+?)_/g, '$1')
    .replace(/`(.+?)`/g, '$1')
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, '');
    }
    function splitMdInline(text) {
    // Tokeniza la línea en segmentos con estilos
    const segments = [];
    let remaining = text;
    // Estado actual de estilos
    let bold = false, italic = false, underline = false, mono = false;
    let buf = '';
    const flush = () => {
    if (buf) segments.push({ text: buf, bold, italic, underline, mono });
    buf = '';
    };
    // Parser simple con regex secuencial
    // Orden: ** antes que *, __ antes que _
    const patterns = [
    { re: /^\*\*(.+?)\*\*/, toggle: 'bold' },
    { re: /^\*(.+?)\*/, toggle: 'italic' },
    { re: /^__(.+?)__/, toggle: 'underline' },
    { re: /^_(.+?)_/, toggle: 'italic' },
    { re: /^`(.+?)`/, toggle: 'mono' },
    { re: /^<br\s*\/?>/i, br: true },
    ];
    let pos = 0;
    while (pos < remaining.length) {
    let matched = false;
    for (const pat of patterns) {
    const m = remaining.slice(pos).match(pat.re);
    if (m) {
    flush();
    if (pat.br) {
    segments.push({ br: true });
    } else {
    segments.push({
    text: m[1],
    bold: pat.toggle === 'bold',
    italic: pat.toggle === 'italic',
    underline: pat.toggle === 'underline',
    mono: pat.toggle === 'mono'
    });
    }
    pos += m[0].length;
    matched = true; break;
    }
    }
    if (!matched) { buf += remaining[pos]; pos++; }
    }
    flush();
    return segments;
    }
    // =========================================================
    // LATEX PREPROCESSOR (mejorado)
    // =========================================================
    function preprocessLatex(raw) {
    let text = raw;
    // 0. Cortar el preámbulo: todo lo que está antes de \begin{document}
    // Los documentos LaTeX reales tienen mucho basura en el preámbulo que no queremos renderizar
    const docIdx = text.indexOf('\\begin{document}');
    if (docIdx !== -1) {
    text = text.substring(docIdx + '\\begin{document}'.length);
    }
    // 1. Eliminar comentarios LaTeX
    text = text.replace(/(?<!\\)%[^\n]*/g, '');
    // 2. Eliminar comandos de estructura de documento
    text = text.replace(/\\documentclass(\[.*?\])?\{[^}]*\}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\usepackage(\[.*?\])?\{[^}]*\}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{document\}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\end\{document\}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\maketitle/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\title\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SEC⌉$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\author\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\date\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n$1\n');
    // 3. Comandos de página y layout
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:thispagestyle|pagestyle|fancyhf|fancyhead|fancyfoot)(\{[^}]*\}|\[[^\]]*\]){0,3}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:newpage|clearpage|pagebreak)/g, '\n⌈PAGEBREAK⌉\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:noindent|indent)/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:centering)/g, '');
    // 4. Espaciado vertical
    text = text.replace(/\\vspace\*?\{[^}]*\}/g, '\n⌈VS⌉\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\medskip/g, '\n⌈VS⌉\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\bigskip/g, '\n⌈VS⌉\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\smallskip/g, '\n⌈VS⌉\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\vfill/g, '\n⌈VS⌉\n');
    // 5. Espaciado horizontal
    text = text.replace(/\\hspace\*?\{[^}]*\}/g, ' ');
    text = text.replace(/\\hfill/g, ' ');
    text = text.replace(/\\quad/g, ' ').replace(/\\qquad/g, ' ');
    text = text.replace(/\\,/g, ' ').replace(/\\;/g, ' ').replace(/\\:/g, ' ').replace(/\\!/g, '');
    // 6. Saltos de línea
    text = text.replace(/\\\\(\[\d+(?:pt|cm|mm)\])?/g, '\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:newline|linebreak|br)/g, '\n');
    // <br> de HTML que puedan estar en el texto
    text = text.replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, '\n');
    // 7. Entornos matemáticos
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{align\*?\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{align\*?\}/g, (_, inner) =>
    '\n' + inner.split(/\\\\/).map(l => l.replace(/&/g, ' ').trim()).filter(l => l).map(l => '⌈MATH⌉' + l).join('\n') + '\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{equation\*?\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{equation\*?\}/g, (_, inner) =>
    '\n⌈MATH⌉' + inner.replace(/\\\\/g, ' ').trim() + '\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{gather\*?\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{gather\*?\}/g, (_, inner) =>
    '\n' + inner.split(/\\\\/).map(l => l.trim()).filter(l => l).map(l => '⌈MATH⌉' + l).join('\n') + '\n');
    // Modo inline $...$ y $$...$$
    text = text.replace(/\$\$([^\$]+)\$\$/g, '\n⌈MATH⌉$1\n');
    // Los $ inline los dejamos para tokenize
    // 8. Otros entornos
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{center\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{center\}/g, (_, inner) =>
    '\n⌈CENTER⌉' + inner.trim() + '\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{itemize\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{itemize\}/g, (_, inner) => {
    return '\n' + inner.replace(/\\item\s*/g, '• ') + '\n';
    });
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{enumerate\}([\s\S]*?)\\end\{enumerate\}/g, (_, inner) => {
    let n = 0; return '\n' + inner.replace(/\\item\s*/g, () => (++n) + '. ') + '\n';
    });
    // Ignorar otros entornos desconocidos (solo quitar el begin/end)
    text = text.replace(/\\begin\{[^}]*\}/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\end\{[^}]*\}/g, '');
    // 9. Secciones
    text = text.replace(/\\section\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SEC⌉$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\subsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SSEC⌉$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\subsubsection\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SSSEC⌉$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\paragraph\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SSEC⌉$1\n');
    text = text.replace(/\\chapter\*?\{([^}]*)\}/g, '\n⌈SEC⌉$1\n');
    // 10. Línea y regla
    text = text.replace(/\\rule\{[^}]*\}\{[^}]*\}/g, '⌈RULE⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\hrule/g, '⌈RULE⌉');
    // 11. Formatos de texto
    text = text.replace(/\\fbox\{([\s\S]*?)\}/g, '⌈BOX⌉$1⌈/BOX⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\textbf\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈U⌉$1⌈/U⌉'); // negrita → subrayado manuscrito
    text = text.replace(/\\textit\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈I⌉$1⌈/I⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\emph\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈I⌉$1⌈/I⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\underline\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈U⌉$1⌈/U⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\text\{([^}]*)\}/g, '$1');
    text = text.replace(/\\mathrm\{([^}]*)\}/g, '$1');
    text = text.replace(/\\mathbf\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈B⌉$1⌈/B⌉');
    text = text.replace(/\\mathit\{([^}]*)\}/g, '⌈I⌉$1⌈/I⌉');
    // 12. Paréntesis grandes
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:bigl|bigr|Bigl|Bigr|left|right)\s*([([{\])}.|])/g, '$1');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:big|Big|bigg|Bigg)[lr]?\s*([([{\])}.|])/g, '$1');
    // 13. Comandos residuales
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:LaTeX|TeX)/g, 'LaTeX');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:textwidth|linewidth|columnwidth)/g, '');
    text = text.replace(/\\(?:today)/g, new Date().toLocaleDateString('es'));
    // Limpiar comandos con argumento (repetir para anidados)
    for (let pass = 0; pass < 3; pass++) {
    text = text.replace(/\\(?!frac|sqrt)[a-zA-Z]+\{([^}]*)\}/g, '$1');
    }
    // Limpiar comandos sin argumento QUE NO SEAN símbolos LaTeX.
    // Los símbolos (\sigma, \alpha, etc.) se dejan para que tokenize los sustituya
    // con la fuente correcta (peso normal). Pre-sustituirlos aquí los dejaba
    // en Unicode puro que la fuente de reserva renderizaba en negrilla.
    const _symCmdSet = new Set(SYM_KEYS.map(k => k.slice(1)));
    _symCmdSet.add('frac'); _symCmdSet.add('sqrt');
    text = text.replace(/\\([a-zA-Z]+)/g, (m, cmd) => _symCmdSet.has(cmd) ? m : '');
    // NOTA: Se eliminó la limpieza global de llaves aquí, porque rompía las
    // fracciones y raíces anidadas antes de llegar al tokenizer matemático.
    // 14. Parsear bloques
    const lines = text.split('\n');
    const blocks = [];
    for (const raw of lines) {
    const line = raw.trim();
    if (!line) { blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 8 }); continue; }
    if (line === '⌈VS⌉') { blocks.push({ type: 'vs', h: 20 }); continue; }
    if (line === '⌈RULE⌉') { blocks.push({ type: 'rule' }); continue; }
    if (line === '⌈PAGEBREAK⌉') { blocks.push({ type: 'pagebreak' }); continue; }
    if (line.startsWith('⌈SEC⌉')) { blocks.push({ type: 'text', content: cleanCmd(line.replace('⌈SEC⌉', '')), bold: false, scale: 1.0, centered: true }); continue; }
    if (line.startsWith('⌈SSEC⌉')) { blocks.push({ type: 'subsec', content: cleanCmd(line.replace('⌈SSEC⌉', '')), bold: false, scale: 1.0, ssecIndent: 40 }); continue; }
    if (line.startsWith('⌈SSSEC⌉')) { blocks.push({ type: 'subsec', content: cleanCmd(line.replace('⌈SSSEC⌉', '')), bold: false, scale: 1.0, ssecIndent: 70 }); continue; }
    if (line.startsWith('⌈MATH⌉')) {
    // Limpiar marcadores de formato que puedan haberse colado en el contenido math
    // (ej: \fbox{$...$} genera ⌈BOX⌉ dentro del bloque MATH)
    let mathContent = line.replace('⌈MATH⌉', '')
    .replace(/⌈\/?BOX⌉/g, '') // fbox dentro de math → solo el contenido
    .replace(/⌈\/?[A-Z]+⌉/g, ''); // cualquier otro marcador residual
    blocks.push({ type: 'math', content: mathContent });
    continue;
    }
    if (line.startsWith('⌈CENTER⌉')) { blocks.push({ type: 'text', content: cleanCmd(line.replace('⌈CENTER⌉', '')), centered: true }); continue; }
    parseInlineBlocks(line, blocks);
    // Separador de línea: evita que bloques inline de líneas distintas se encadenen
    blocks.push({ type: 'nl' });
    }
    return blocks;
    }
    // =========================================================
    // PREPROCESSOR MIXTO
    // =========================================================
    function preprocessMixed(raw) {
    // Primero pasa por LaTeX, luego interpreta Markdown en texto plano
    // Estrategia: identificar líneas que son puro LaTeX vs. puro Markdown
    // Simple: correr LaTeX preprocessor pero antes manejar Markdown básico
    let text = raw;
    // Convertir Markdown headings antes de LaTeX si no hay \section
    if (!text.includes('\\section') && !text.includes('\\subsection')) {
    text = text.replace(/^###\s+(.*)$/mg, '\\subsubsection{$1}');
    text = text.replace(/^##\s+(.*)$/mg, '\\subsection{$1}');
    text = text.replace(/^#\s+(.*)$/mg, '\\section{$1}');
    }
    // Markdown bold/italic → LaTeX si no hay textbf/textit
    text = text.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '\\textbf{$1}');
    text = text.replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '\\textit{$1}');
    text = text.replace(/__(.+?)__/g, '\\underline{$1}');
    // Regla horizontal
    text = text.replace(/^[-*_]{3,}$/mg, '\\rule{0}{0}');
    return preprocessLatex(text);
    }
    function cleanCmd(s) { return s.replace(/\\[,;:!]/g, ' ').replace(/\\\\/g, ' ').trim(); }
    function parseInlineBlocks(line, blocks) {
    const parts = line.split(/(⌈\/?[A-Z]+⌉)/);
    let bold = false, italic = false, underline = false, boxed = false;
    for (const p of parts) {
    if (p === '⌈B⌉') { bold = true; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈/B⌉') { bold = false; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈I⌉') { italic = true; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈/I⌉') { italic = false; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈U⌉') { underline = true; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈/U⌉') { underline = false; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈BOX⌉') { boxed = true; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈/BOX⌉') { boxed = false; continue; }
    if (p === '⌈RULE⌉') { blocks.push({ type: 'rule' }); continue; }
    const cleaned = p.trim();
    if (cleaned) blocks.push({ type: boxed ? 'boxed' : 'text', content: cleaned, bold, italic, underline, inline: true });
    }
    }
    function findBrace(s, i) {
    if (s[i] !== '{') return -1;
    let d = 1;
    for (let j = i + 1; j < s.length; j++) {
    if (s[j] === '{') d++; else if (s[j] === '}') { d--; if (d === 0) return j; }
    } return -1;
    }
    // =========================================================
    // TOKENIZER (LaTeX math)
    // =========================================================
    function tokenize(str) {
    for (const k of SYM_KEYS) str = str.split(k).join(SYM[k]);
    str = str.replace(/\$\$/g, '').replace(/\$/g, '');
    const tokens = []; let i = 0, buf = '';
    const flush = () => { if (buf) { tokens.push({ t: 'text', v: buf }); buf = ''; } };
    while (i < str.length) {
    if (str.startsWith('\\sqrt', i)) {
    flush(); let j = i + 5;
    while (j < str.length && str[j] === ' ') j++;
    if (j < str.length && str[j] === '{') { const e = findBrace(str, j); if (e !== -1) { tokens.push({ t: 'sqrt', inner: tokenize(str.substring(j + 1, e)) }); i = e + 1; continue; } }
    if (j < str.length) { tokens.push({ t: 'sqrt', inner: [{ t: 'text', v: str[j] }] }); i = j + 1; continue; }
    buf += '√'; i = j; continue;
    }
    if (str.startsWith('\\frac', i)) {
    flush(); let j = i + 5;
    while (j < str.length && str[j] === ' ') j++;
    if (j < str.length && str[j] === '{') {
    const e1 = findBrace(str, j);
    if (e1 !== -1) {
    let k = e1 + 1;
    while (k < str.length && str[k] === ' ') k++;
    if (k < str.length && str[k] === '{') {
    const e2 = findBrace(str, k);
    if (e2 !== -1) { tokens.push({ t: 'frac', num: tokenize(str.substring(j + 1, e1)), den: tokenize(str.substring(k + 1, e2)) }); i = e2 + 1; continue; }
    }
    }
    }
    if (j < str.length - 1) { tokens.push({ t: 'frac', num: [{ t: 'text', v: str[j] }], den: [{ t: 'text', v: str[j + 1] }] }); i = j + 2; continue; }
    buf += 'frac'; i = j; continue;
    }
    if (str[i] === '^') {
    flush(); let j = i + 1, et;
    while (j < str.length && str[j] === ' ') j++;
    if (j < str.length && str[j] === '{') { const e = findBrace(str, j); if (e !== -1) { et = tokenize(str.substring(j + 1, e)); i = e + 1; } else { buf += '^'; i = j; continue; } }
    else if (j < str.length) { et = [{ t: 'text', v: str[j] }]; i = j + 1; } else { buf += '^'; i = j; continue; }
    tokens.push({ t: 'sup', exp: et }); continue;
    }
    if (str[i] === '_') {
    flush(); let j = i + 1, st;
    while (j < str.length && str[j] === ' ') j++;
    if (j < str.length && str[j] === '{') { const e = findBrace(str, j); if (e !== -1) { st = tokenize(str.substring(j + 1, e)); i = e + 1; } else { buf += '_'; i = j; continue; } }
    else if (j < str.length) { st = [{ t: 'text', v: str[j] }]; i = j + 1; } else { buf += '_'; i = j; continue; }
    tokens.push({ t: 'sub', sub: st }); continue;
    }
    if (str[i] === '{' || str[i] === '}') { i++; continue; }
